title: Statistics at Skills England
body: "Find our statistics  Our statistics can be found and searched at the Skills England research and statistics page when Skills England publishes research or statistics.   You can also sign up to get email alerts for research and statistics on this page.  Standards for official statistics  Skills England’s official statistics follow the standards defined in the UK Statistics Authority Code of Practice for Official Statistics,  Skills England standards for official statistics  View statistics on :   The Employer Skills survey Occupations in Demand   "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
